channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: WLD eyes a tight breakout as momentum builds: bulls press $0.30 resistance, potential move toward $0.32–$0.35 if April momentum sticks. ⚡️ https://Blockchain.News/news/20260411-price-prediction-wld-worldcoin-eyes-030-breakout-amid-technical #crypto #Worldcoin #WLD

item.title: OP eyes a bounce: $0.11 now, $0.13 by May 2026 if resistance breaks. 💥 Will this consolidation crack or drift lower? https://Blockchain.News/news/20260411-price-prediction-op-targets-013-by-may-2026-despite #OP #Crypto #Trading
